hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command // \"\""); if printf "%s" "$cmd" | grep -Eq "release-it|pnpm[[:space:]]+(run[[:space:]]+)?release" && ! printf "%s" "$cmd" | grep -q -- "--ci"; then printf "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"Interactive release-it hangs in this no-TTY session. Re-run non-interactively with --ci: pnpm release:<bump> --ci (minor for new features, patch for fixes).\"}}"; fi
